sales.description:
Ancients
CAPPADOCIA. Caesarea. Nero, as Augustus (AD 54-68). AR hemidrachm (15mm, 1.78 gm, 1h). NGC Choice VF 5/5 - 2/5, brushed. NERO CLAVD DIVI CLAV-D F CAESAR AVG GERMANI, laureate head of Nero right / Nike seated right on globe, wreath in both hands. RPC I 3645.

Nero, born Lucius Domitius Ahenobarbus in 37 AD, ascended to the Roman imperial throne in 54 AD, initiating a tumultuous reign that both captivated and horrified contemporaries. Initially perceived as a youthful and promising rule...
